mapper.insert: insert into user (anonymous_id, openid, avatar, user_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{anonymousId}, #{openid}, #{avatar}, #{userStatus}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: select (select count(*) from content where anonymous_id = #{anonymousId}) as publishCount, (select count(*) from `like` where target_type = 1 and target_id in (select id from content where anonymous_id = #{anonymousId})) as likeCount, (select count(*) from comment where content_id in (select id from content where anonymous_id = #{anonymousId})) as commentCount
select count(*) from content where anonymous_id = #{anonymousId}
select count(*) from `like` where target_type = 1 and target_id in (select id from content where anonymous_id = #{anonymousId})
mapper.update: update user set anonymous_id = #{param2} where anonymous_id = #{param1}
update content set anonymous_id = #{param2} where anonymous_id = #{param1}
update comment set anonymous_id = #{param2} where anonymous_id = #{param1}
update hug set anonymous_id = #{param2} where anonymous_id = #{param1}
update message set sender_anonymous_id = #{param2} where sender_anonymous_id = #{param1}
update message set receiver_anonymous_id = #{param2} where receiver_anonymous_id = #{param1}
update report set anonymous_id = #{param2} where anonymous_id = #{param1}
mapper.select: select date(create_time) as date, count(*) as count from user where create_time >= date_sub(curdate(), interval 7 day) group by date(create_time) order by date(create_time) desc
